commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a bundled policy extension, `policy check`, channel deny-rule evidence and attestations, doctor lint/repair health-check plumbing, an oc-path document API, docs, tests, and SDK/export metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the latest PR head shows malformed policy diagnostics are discarded and `doctor --fix --only` is accepted but not honored. The broader PR is a new feature proposal, so there is no current-main bug reproduction path for the product request itself.
